evaluators.name: Cheapest Saturday Afternoon Special Exhibition Ticket Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user searched for Saturday afternoon special exhibition slots under $20, then created a ticket booking and checkout order for the cheapest qualifying slot with 2 adult tickets.

evaluators.name: Free Family Exhibitions Visit Plan Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user filtered for free, family-friendly exhibitions in the next 7 days, then added the first three (soonest-starting) qualifying exhibitions to the visit plan.

evaluators.name: Evening Workshop Registration Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user searched for May 20 evening workshops under $30, then registered 1 adult and 1 teen with pay-on-arrival for a qualifying event.

evaluators.name: Highly Rated Postcards Cart Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user filtered postcards to price ≤ $5 and rating ≥ 4, sorted by highest rating, then added the first three distinct qualifying postcards to the cart.

evaluators.name: Artwork Conservation Fund Donation Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user made a one-time donation under $30 to a conservation/preservation fund using a credit/debit card, with the payment completed.

evaluators.name: Cheapest Student Annual Membership Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user filtered to annual student/youth plans under $60, then started enrollment for the cheapest qualifying plan starting next month with digital delivery and a checkout order.

evaluators.name: Newsletter Subscription Preferences Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user subscribed with an email, selected monthly highlights and new exhibitions/openings, chose HTML format, and indicated interests in contemporary art and family activities.

evaluators.name: Weekday Morning Accessible Tour Booking Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user searched for weekday morning wheelchair-accessible tours in English, then booked the first matching schedule that can host 5 visitors and proceeded to checkout.
